name: Priya Sharma
resume_text: Senior Java Engineer with 8 years building secure microservices for federal programs. Active Secret clearance. Designed Spring Boot services on AWS (ECS, RDS, SQS) for a DoD case-management system. Led migration of a monolith to Kafka-driven microservices. Strong REST API design, PostgreSQL, CI/CD with GitLab.

name: James Okafor
resume_text: Cloud/DevOps Engineer, 6 years. Public Trust. Builds FedRAMP-aligned infrastructure with Terraform and EKS. Automated CI/CD (GitHub Actions, Jenkins), containerized legacy apps with Docker, and wrote Python tooling for cost and compliance reporting.

name: Wei Chen
resume_text: SOC Analyst II with 5 years on classified networks. Active Top Secret. Day-to-day Splunk ES, incident response, and threat hunting aligned to NIST 800-53. Built Python automation for alert triage and SOAR playbooks.

name: Maria Gonzalez
resume_text: Full-Stack Java Developer, 6 years, commercial background. Spring + Angular SPAs, REST APIs, SQL. No active clearance but is clearable (US Citizen). Interested in moving into federal work.

name: David Thompson
resume_text: ServiceNow Developer, 4 years. Public Trust. Built ITSM catalogs, Flow Designer workflows, and Integration Hub spokes. CSA + CAD certified. Delivered a federal agency's incident and request modules end to end.

name: Ahmed Khan
resume_text: DevOps Engineer, 7 years. Green Card holder. AWS, Terraform, Jenkins, Ansible on Linux. Strong automation background in commercial fintech; no clearance yet. Open to Public Trust roles.
